##NAMES=Manitobaite
##RRUFFID=R130259
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_16_Mn^2+^_25_Al_8_(PO_4_)_30_
##LOCALITY=Gottcha Claim (Pegmatite No. 22), Cross Lake, Manitoba, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Red-brown massive, associated with quartz
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130259

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
